birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Subfossil kea bones have been found in sand dunes at Mataikona in the eastern Wairarapa, Poukawa near Hastings, and Waitomo, indicating that they ranged through lowland forest over much of the North Island until the arrival of Polynesian settlers about 750 years ago.{{cite journal | last1 = Holdaway | first1 = R.N
